motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def gardenNoAdj(self, n: int, paths: List[List[int]]) -> List[int]:
    result = []
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        for j in range(i, n+1):
            if paths[i][0] == paths[j][1] or paths[i][1] == paths[j][0]:
                continue
            result.append(i)
            result.append(j)
    return result

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n^2)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
